nodes.title: Positive Prompt
widgets_values: Vertical short video, cinematic close-up portrait, strong lip sync to the provided narration, realistic facial motion, expressive eyes, subtle head movement, natural shoulders and torso motion, shallow depth of field, soft key light, background simple and clean, high detail skin, realistic mouth articulation, stable framing, short-form social media style, portrait orientation, professional short video, consistent identity, no subtitle burn-in.

nodes.title: Negative Prompt
widgets_values: blurry, low quality, duplicated face, extra fingers, bad anatomy, subtitles, text overlay, watermark, heavy compression artifacts, flicker, jumpy camera, frozen face, bad lipsync, distorted mouth, deformed eyes

extra.note: Generated from real ComfyUI 0.4 workflow exports and local installed LTX examples.
